message:
refactor(index,rerank): extract WAL resolution method and guard score cardinality

search.rs: Extract 30-line WAL hit resolution into dedicated
resolve_wal_hit() method with checked_add() overflow protection and
improved error messages. Add wal_index_marker_out_of_bounds test.

rerank/lib.rs: Replace enumerate().zip(all_scores) with explicit
index-based loop and .get() check to prevent silent score truncation
if document/score cardinality ever diverges. Reports detailed
mismatch on failure.

searcher.rs: Reformat .search() call to multi-line for readability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
